name_cn:
* Mini Puzzle Edge 2.0 Version
👈 Newly upgraded ♻️
Dimensions: 18-8-12.5cm
Geometric upgrade! New outer stitching design added to the classic silhouette, flap made of suede, body made of imported lambskin, YKK hardware.
Feels hin good~ Versatile and practical, too beautiful to look away ✨ Very photogenic, girls go for it 🐤
